commit.subject: LU-19200 tests: Check routing/buffers/numa import
commit.message:
LU-19200 tests: Check routing/buffers/numa import

Add tests to validate import of routing, buffers, and numa yaml
configuration.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ib186323fa96b0c19790f1485efe0d72b37965f8d
